meta_title: Removals Bexhill | Local Coastal Movers | Mark Ratcliffe
meta_description: Bexhill-on-Sea removals from our Sussex base. House removals, man and van, storage and international. BAR registered, 40+ years experience.
intro_paragraph: Bexhill-on-Sea has been part of our regular routing for over four decades. From our Lower Dicker depot we reach Bexhill in about thirty minutes via the A259 coast road. We move terraced houses on Sea Road, art deco flats off Cooden Drive, family homes in Sidley and country properties on the Bexhill outskirts — all with the same BAR-standard pad-wrap care we have applied since 1982.

sections.body_html:
Bexhill-on-Sea has been part of our regular routing for over four decades. From our Lower Dicker depot we reach Bexhill in about thirty minutes via the A259 coast road. We move terraced houses on Sea Road, art deco flats off Cooden Drive, family homes in Sidley and country properties on the Bexhill outskirts — all with the same BAR-standard pad-wrap care we have applied since 1982.

  • BAR-registered family business — 40+ years moving Sussex households
  • Premium pad-wrap protection on every item
  • Guaranteed move date once your 20% deposit is received
  • No charge for postponements, key waits or cancellations
  • Trained, uniformed crews in liveried vans

sections.heading: The Bexhill removal services we offer
sections.body_html:
The Bexhill removal services we offer

Full house removals

Single rooms, full houses, country estates. We pad-wrap, label, transport and place every item in your new home.

Learn more →

Man and van Bexhill

Smaller, budget-friendly moves. Same BAR-trained crew, smaller vehicle, hourly rate.

Learn more →

Storage near Bexhill

Individual steel Prestige rooms at our Lower Dicker depot. CCTV, alarmed access, monthly billing.

Learn more →

International from Bexhill

Specialist UK to Thailand and worldwide door-to-door relocation service from your Bexhill home.

Learn more →

Packing services

Full or fragile-only packing — our premium pad-wrap method is what separates a Mark Ratcliffe move from a generic remover.

Learn more →

Office & commercial

Out-of-hours business moves with minimal downtime. IT-equipment handling and document storage.

Learn more →

sections.heading: Why local matters when you choose a Bexhill removal company
sections.body_html:
Why local matters when you choose a Bexhill removal company

Choosing a local removal firm for your Bexhill move is not just about convenience — it is about cost, reliability and routing knowledge. From our Lower Dicker depot, our crews reach Bexhill via the A259 coast road and the A269, and they know the area's quirks: where parking is tight, which streets have low bridges, where the parking-suspension applications need to go and what time the school-run traffic builds up. National movers pricing in a Bexhill job have to factor in the long empty leg back to their yard; we do not, so our quotes are typically more competitive for Bexhill addresses.

We are also part of the local community. You will recognise our vans on the A259 coast road and the A269, you may have seen them at the De La Warr Pavilion, Bexhill seafront and Bexhill Down, and our family has been part of Sussex life for over forty years. Many of our customers are repeat clients or referrals from neighbours we moved years earlier.

We cover Cooden, Sidley, Little Common, Old Town Bexhill and Pebsham as part of our standard Bexhill service area, with no extra travel charges within these districts.

sections.heading: How we protect your possessions
sections.body_html:
How we protect your possessions

Every Bexhill move uses our signature pad-wrap process. Each piece of furniture is individually wrapped in a thick quilted blanket inside your home, taped, labelled, then carried out — and only unwrapped once it is placed in its final position in your new property. This is the same method used by high-end international movers, and it is why our breakage rate is a fraction of the industry average.

sections.heading: A recent Bexhill move
sections.body_html:
A recent Bexhill move

A De La Warr seafront flat move

A couple moving from a Cooden flat to one of the iconic De La Warr-area apartments needed us to coordinate with a tight 30-minute parking suspension. We pre-staged the lorry, sent a four-man crew and completed loading inside the window — and the unpacking finished by lunch.

sections.heading: What sets us apart from generic national movers
sections.body_html:
What sets us apart from generic national movers

Generic national removal firms quote your move based on volume and postcode distance — but they cover everywhere, so they know nowhere. They will not know the parking restrictions on your street, the tight stairwell in the older terraces, or the school-run window that determines whether a 7.5-tonne lorry can manoeuvre at 8.30am. We do. We are also accountable locally — many of our customers are repeat clients or referrals from neighbours, so the move-day experience matters to us in a way that a national chain simply cannot replicate. And finally, on price: our quotes typically beat the nationals on local moves because we are not pricing in the empty leg back to a Midlands depot.

sections.heading: What to expect on move day with us
sections.body_html:
What to expect on move day with us

Our crews follow the same routine on every move, regardless of property size: arrive 8.00–8.30am, walk the rooms with you, lay floor protection, pad-wrap furniture in the room before carrying out, load in a planned sequence, walk through the empty house with you before locking up, head to the new address, unload in reverse order placing furniture in the right room, unwrap and place each item, beds reassembled, final walk-through, sign-off. The whole process for a typical 3-bedroom local move runs 8am to 3-4pm.

sections.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.body_html:
Frequently Asked Questions

Can you access Cooden Beach properties for removals?

Yes. We have moved many of the properties along Cooden Drive and the seafront blocks. We always confirm vehicle size and parking suspensions during the survey.

Do you cover the smaller Bexhill villages?

Pebsham, Sidley, Little Common and Hooe are all within our regular Bexhill routing.

Can you store furniture from a Bexhill move?

Yes — our Prestige steel storage rooms at Lower Dicker are about 35 minutes from Bexhill. We routinely store furniture for Bexhill customers who are downsizing or in transition.
